title: digitaria lanuginosa
intro: Digitaria lanuginosa, also known as woolly crabgrass, is a type of grassy weed native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Digitaria lanuginosa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used to treat a range of ailments, including coughs, colds, and skin conditions.
